entries.description: Bamboo shoots are very popular amongst Bishnupriya Manipuris. Although they consume fresh mostly unlike some who like the pickled version.
Taro roots are also very popular amongst Bishnupriya Manipuris. There are different varieties of Taro roots though.
Banana flower is another very popular vegetable consumed by Bishnupriya Manipuris. Rich in iron.
Pumpkins are a popular vegetable amongst Bishnupriya Manipuris, particularly on festive occasions
Bottle gourds are common alsmost to every household and are a staple part of diet.
